message:
chore(conformance): regenerate conformance reports after ABI expansion and membrane hardening

Refresh all five conformance report snapshots to reflect the current state
of the codebase after the ABI duplicate removal, new glibc_internal/fortify/
stdbit/io_internal families, and the membrane hardening changes.

Key metric changes:
- Total symbols increased from 1279 to 2773 (newly exported ABI families)
- Coverage percentage recalculated against the larger symbol set
- fixture_pipeline.v1.json expanded significantly with new fixture entries
- support_matrix_maintenance_report.v1.json consolidated and reduced
- cross_report_consistency.v1.json updated for inter-report agreement

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
